name: Yahoo · SerpApi

env_keys.comment: Same SerpApi key for all engines; anysearch uses `engine="yahoo"`.

requires_key.source_url: Set SERPAPI_API_KEY. Optional `engine` (e.g. bing, baidu, yandex) — supported web engines include: amazon, apple_app_store, baidu, bing, duckduckgo, ebay, google, naver, walmart, yahoo, yandex, yelp, youtube.
requires_key.comment: Valid API key required for every request.

mode.comment: Fixed SerpApi backend `engine=yahoo` (set via anysearch `engine="yahoo"` with `provider="serpapi"`). No separate fast/deep tier on this engine.

notes: SerpApi proxy to Yahoo (`engine=yahoo`). Native SDK package: google-search-results.
